---
layout: cv
title: Jerry Thomas Twiggs
---

Data Science major at BYU - Idaho

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="twi23005@byui.edu">twi23005@byyui.edu</a>
</div>

## Noteable Skills

Proficient in: 
`R (primarily in Rstudio)` 
`Python` 
`html` 
`CSS` 
`Javascript`


## Education

__Brigham Young University - Idaho__
`Jan 2024 - present`
`Data Science major`
`3.92 GPA`

__University of Utah__
`Sep 2020- Apr 2021`
`Quantitative Analysis of Markets and Organizations major`
`3.83 GPA`

__Utah Tech University__
`Associate's degree - Associate of Science`
`Sep 2018 - Apr 2020`
`Honor Roll`
`3.72 GPA`

__ACE / Success Academy Dixie__
`High School Diploma`
`Sep 2016 - Apr 2020`
`Honor Roll`
`3.72 GPA`


## Awards & Certifications

`Sterling Scholarship Winner 2020`
`New Century Scholarship recipient 2020`
`Licensed Life & Health Insurance Agent`


## Work Experience

__College Student__
`2024 - present`

__Academic Tutor__
Iron County School District, ACE Academy, Saint George, Utah
`Jan 2020 - May 2020`
`Tutor for:`
`Calculus I (Math 1210)`
`College Algebra (Math 1050)`

`Proficient with online tutoring software`

__Prep Cook__
Pasta Factory, Saint George, Utah
`May 2021 - Oct 2021`

__Piano Instructor__
Resonance School of Musicianship, Santa Clara, Utah
`Oct 2019 - May 2020`

__Life & Health Insurance Agent__
Self Employed
`May 2021 - present`

__Medical Data Recorder__
Night Light Pediatrics, Saint George, Utah
`Apr 2017 - Aug 2018`



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: July 2024 -->
